data.title: Reti SpA Updates Articles to Enhance Corporate Governance
data.description:
Reti SpA (IT:RETI) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

Reti SpA, a prominent Italian IT consulting firm, has approved amendments to its articles of association to refine its corporate purpose and ensure compliance with current regulations. data.title: Cohort plc Updates Shareholders on Voting Rights
data.description:
Cohort plc (GB:CHRT) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!

Cohort plc, a prominent technology group listed on London’s AIM, has announced its total voting rights, revealing an issued share capital of 46,553,804 ordinary shares, each carrying one voting right. This information is vital for shareholders determining their stake in the company under FCA rules. Cohort operates in the defence and related markets, with innovative businesses across the UK, Germany, and Portugal.

Beazley plc has confirmed its total voting rights as 638,942,417 shares as of November 29, 2024, offering a clear picture for investors regarding their shareholding calculations. The company, a leader in specialist insurance markets, operates globally with a strong presence in Europe, North America, Latin America, and Asia, underpinned by its highly-rated Lloyd’s syndicates. data.title: Marvell and AWS Expand Strategic Partnership for Cloud
data.description:
Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

An announcement from Marvell ( (MRVL) ) is now available.

Marvell Technology and Amazon Web Services (AWS) have expanded their strategic partnership in a multi-generational agreement to enhance cloud infrastructure with advanced data center semiconductors. This collaboration aims to boost efficiency and innovation by leveraging Marvell’s semiconductor solutions, including custom AI products and networking hardware, integrated with AWS’s scalable cloud capabilities. This partnership is expected to accelerate Marvell’s silicon design process and empower AWS to deliver robust AI and cloud services.
